examples: Synchronise the score with the film action.
I shouldn't have to synchronise my cellphone with my PC when in Bluetooth range-it should just happen.
The liar will also fail to synchronise with themselves, for example saying they did not do something whilst nodding.
Soundsynk allows mobile users to synchronise their devices to one machine so they all act as speakers.
BMWs can even synchronise with Apple's iPhone, and download maps and directions from Google while you drive.
